commencement.location: Credit Union 1 Arena, 525 South Racine, and UIC Dorin Forum, 725 West Roosevelt

final_exam_schedule.note: UIC uses a standard exam block schedule based on class meeting days and times

scale.description: Credit under the Credit/No Credit option
No Credit under the Credit/No Credit option
Deferred, used for graduate courses, independent study courses, and certain study abroad courses only

grading_system.gpa_calculation: UIC uses a 4.00 grade point system. GPA is calculated by multiplying the grade points per hour for each course by the number of semester hours for the course, adding total grade points, adding total semester hours attempted, and dividing total grade points by total semester hours. Courses numbered 001-099 do not count in the GPA.
grading_system.pass_fail_rules: UIC uses a Credit/No Credit option. Students must be in good standing, may take no more than one course per term under this option, and may earn a maximum of 21 semester hours under CR/NC. The option may not be used for courses required for the major, including prerequisite and collateral courses, and may not be used for ENGL 160 or ENGL 161. It must be elected by the end of the tenth day of instruction. A letter grade of A, B, C, or D becomes CR. An F becomes NC. CR and NC do not count in the GPA.
grading_system.incomplete_grade_rules: An I may be assigned only when the student has been making satisfactory progress, cannot complete coursework because of unusual circumstances beyond personal control acceptable to the instructor, and presents those reasons before final grades are due. The work must be completed within one calendar year. If an undergraduate student does not satisfy the conditions, the I becomes F.
grading_system.grade_replacement_policy: Up to four UIC courses with D or F grades may be excluded, one at a time, to help a student meet UIC GPA and or program GPA graduation requirements. Only the college may initiate exclusions.
grading_system.repeat_course_rules: Courses with A or B grades may not be repeated. Courses with D or F grades may be repeated once without written permission. Repeating a course more than once requires written permission from the student's college dean.

academic_standing.honors_college_gpa: Minimum 3.40/4.00 to maintain. Between 3.15-3.40 = Honors GPA Notice. Below 3.15 = automatic dismissal.

registration_rules.waitlist_rules: When a seat opens, student has 24 hours to claim it. Miss it and go back to bottom of waitlist.
registration_rules.max_credit_hours_per_semester: 12-18 hours full time. Above 18 requires college permission.
registration_rules.late_add_process: After online add/drop period, changes must go through student's college office.
registration_rules.override_process: Contact course department or college for Departmental Approval Required or restriction errors.

graduation_requirements.min_uic_credits: Last 30 hours must be at UIC (60 hours for Business)

undergraduate_policies.readmission: Students who have not attended for 2+ semesters (excluding summer) must apply for readmission.
undergraduate_policies.double_major_rules: Both majors must be within one college. No extra hours usually needed.
undergraduate_policies.repeat_rules: Cannot repeat A/B courses. D/F can repeat once without permission.
